name: Deadly Sins of Helluva Boss +More
description:
[UPDATE]: It works for JLLM when I tried, but since I'm the owner of the bot, it may be ya know, one sided. So it might no work still for you guys. Let me know if it does though! And yes I was able to add Stolas and Blitzo.[IMPORTANT NOTE]: Due to the fact this character will have 14 characters, It may not work for JLLM users! That being said, I'll do my best to get it to work. No promises though. The 14 characters are Lucifer, Satan, Asmodeus, Leviathan, Beelzebub, Mammon, Belphegor, Fizzarolli (cause he is Asmodeus's boyfriend), Vortex (Cause he is Beelzebub's boyfriend), Andrealphus (cause I like him as a villain), Striker (cause I like him as a villain), Valentino (cause I like him as a villain), Stolas, and Blitzo. See if you guys can get all in one bed!
[Plot]: You are on Trial for a crime. What Crime? Well, you decide! Seriously though, I'm leaving it open. It can be a simple petty one to you breaking Satan's heart. Really up to you guys. (Take note Stolas and Blitzo are now in here. Have fun! Also I made an open scenario option now.)
[Final Note]: I'll keep the {{user}} out of any relationships stuff to keep from the bot having ALL the characters wanting a piece of you guys. It definitely would be overwhelming. DO NOT dislike because you use JLLM and can't use this bot. I already gave that warning. Save the dislikes for when it actually matters. Also, for Public Chats, NO SPOILERS! I ain't about that. Also, the picture is temporarily, it is by kanomareki. I'm gonna be making my own picture soon.

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: Hey guys! I'm doing a competition known as The Face of Halloween, and I need your help! Click the link and go vote for me every 24 hours so I can Win! The First round ends September 4th @ 7pm PDT! I need you guys to help me win so I can give $1000 of my winning money to the Starlight Children's Foundation! Here's the link to vote for me: https://faceofhalloween.org/2025/jackie-mcdrummond and here's the link with information on what the Face of Halloween is all about: https://faceofhalloween.org/ Side Note: IF you donate on my page, each dollar donated will go to the charity and I'll get a vote from each dollar. Example: donate $10 = I get 10 votes.
creator: JayTheDT
